title: Scape[DEPRECATED]
description: This is archived but I won't move it to the organization because I like looking at the big numbers.
body:
In this Mod-Pack, your main objective is to survive the endless waves of parasites. 
 --------------------------------------------------------
 **In this world you have to progress your way through the tool levels (and armor) without dying.**
--------------------------------------------------------
**THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH FOR YOUR SUPPORT! I would not be able to continue working on these projects without your help!**
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Can you survive in this post-apocalyptic world?


If you have any issues or ideas(logo, video help), please contact me at: chickenmcbrownie@outlook.com


Check out the Newest Version of this modpack here:[https://modrinth.com/modpack/scape-till-the-end](https://modrinth.com/modpack/scape-till-the-end)
